# Research Spec Template

- `Title:`
- `Decision To Inform:`
- `Background / Context:`
- `Primary Uncertainty:`
- `Research Question(s):`
- `Hypothesis:`
- `Method:` (interviews, survey, log analysis, A/B, usability test, etc.)
- `Target Population / Sampling Plan:`
- `Metrics and Decision Thresholds:`
- `Data Sources and Instrumentation:`
- `Execution Plan:` (timeline, owner, milestones)
- `Limitations / Bias Risks:`
- `Decision Trigger:` (proceed / adjust / stop criteria)
- `Source References:`
- `Readiness Verdict: Ready | Needs Refinement`
- `Failed Gates:` (required when `Needs Refinement`)
- `Missing Sources:` (required when grounding is incomplete)
